name: template-retail-rsc-app
description: Production-ready React storefront template for Salesforce Commerce Cloud.

scripts.build: pnpm locales:aggregate-extensions && pnpm generate:cartridge && react-router build
scripts.dev: pnpm locales:aggregate-extensions && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--conditions=dev-data-store sfnext dev
scripts.test:agent: bash -c 'vitest run --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | { grep -E "(Test Files|Tests|Duration|PASS|FAIL|✓|✖)" || true; } | tail -30; exit ${PIPESTATUS[0]}'
scripts.test:agent:coverage: bash -c 'vitest run --coverage --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | { grep -E "(Test Files|Tests|Duration|Coverage|PASS|FAIL|✓|✖)" || true; } | tail -40; exit ${PIPESTATUS[0]}'
scripts.test-storybook:snapshot:agent: bash -c 'vitest run --config ./.storybook/vite.config.ts --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | { grep -E "(Test Files|Tests|Duration|PASS|FAIL|✓|✖)" || true; } | tail -30; exit ${PIPESTATUS[0]}'
scripts.test-storybook:snapshot:update:agent: bash -c 'vitest run -u --config ./.storybook/vite.config.ts --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | { grep -E "(Test Files|Tests|Duration|PASS|FAIL|✓|✖)" || true; } | tail -30; exit ${PIPESTATUS[0]}'
scripts.test-storybook:interaction: cross-env STORYBOOK_DISABLE_A11Y=true concurrently "cross-env STORYBOOK_DISABLE_A11Y=true pnpm storybook" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:6006 && sleep 1 && test-storybook --url http://127.0.0.1:6006 --index-json --config-dir .storybook --browsers chromium --maxWorkers 3 --includeTags interaction" --success first --kill-others
scripts.test-storybook:interaction:agent: bash -c 'cross-env STORYBOOK_DISABLE_A11Y=true concurrently --raw "cross-env STORYBOOK_DISABLE_A11Y=true pnpm storybook" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:6006 && sleep 1 && test-storybook --url http://127.0.0.1:6006 --index-json --config-dir .storybook --browsers chromium --maxWorkers 3 --includeTags interaction" --success first --kill-others 2>&1 | { grep -E "(PASS|FAIL|Test Suites|Tests:)" || true; } | tail -20; exit ${PIPESTATUS[0]}'
scripts.test-storybook:static:interaction: pnpm build-storybook && cross-env STORYBOOK_DISABLE_A11Y=true concurrently "cross-env STORYBOOK_DISABLE_A11Y=true npx serve .storybook/storybook-static" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3000 && sleep 1 && test-storybook --url http://127.0.0.1:3000 --index-json --config-dir .storybook --browsers chromium --maxWorkers 3 --includeTags interaction" --success first --kill-others
scripts.test-storybook:a11y: cross-env STORYBOOK_A11Y_TEST_MODE=error concurrently "pnpm storybook" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:6006 && sleep 1 && test-storybook --url http://127.0.0.1:6006 --index-json --config-dir .storybook --browsers chromium --maxWorkers 3 --excludeTags skip-a11y" --success first --kill-others
scripts.test-storybook:a11y:agent: bash -c 'cross-env STORYBOOK_A11Y_TEST_MODE=error concurrently --raw "pnpm storybook" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:6006 && sleep 1 && test-storybook --url http://127.0.0.1:6006 --index-json --config-dir .storybook --browsers chromium --maxWorkers 3 --excludeTags skip-a11y" --success first --kill-others 2>&1 | { grep -E "(PASS|FAIL|Test Suites|Tests:|violations)" || true; } | tail -20; exit ${PIPESTATUS[0]}'
scripts.test-storybook:static:a11y: pnpm build-storybook && cross-env STORYBOOK_A11Y_TEST_MODE=error concurrently "npx serve .storybook/storybook-static" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3000 && sleep 1 && test-storybook --url http://127.0.0.1:3000 --index-json --config-dir .storybook --browsers chromium --maxWorkers 3 --excludeTags skip-a11y" --success first --kill-others
scripts.config:inspect: sfnext config inspect && echo "Tip: Run \`pnpm config:push-env\` to sync local .env overrides to MRT."

client.name: assets/\(routes\)-_app.*.js
client.comment: App layout route chunk; at 58 kB after dependency updates

client.name: assets/\(package\)-\(@radix-ui-*\)-*.js
client.comment: Radix UI component packages (individually chunked by Vite). Used across the app including checkout.

client.name: assets/\(package\)-\(@vis.gl-react-google-maps\)-*.js
client.comment: Google Maps React components. Used for address input in checkout and store locator.

client.name: assets/\(components\)-\(product-view\)-child-products.*.js
client.comment: Child products component includes Radix UI menu and dropdown dependencies for variant selection

client.name: assets/\(components\)-\(cart-item-modal\)-index.*.js
client.comment: Cart item modal bundles full product editing UI: image gallery, swatches, cart actions (incl. ShareButton → @radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu), and ChildProducts

client.name: assets/\(locales\)-\(en-US\|en-GB\)-index.*.js
client.comment: English locale chunks (all locale translations, includes checkout registration strings). Uncompressed; en-US ~62 kB baseline. Increased to 69 kB (+5%) for maintenancePage translations.

client.name: assets/\(locales\)-\(it-IT\)-index.*.js
client.comment: Italian locale chunk. Italian translations are ~10% more verbose than English due to language characteristics (longer words, articles, formal address forms). Baseline: it-IT ~80 kB vs en-US ~73 kB.

client.name: assets/\(locales\)-*-index.*.js
client.comment: Default limit for other locale chunks. Update individually if Romance languages (es-ES, fr-FR, pt-PT) exceed this.

client.name: assets/\(components\)-\(checkout\)-*.js
client.comment: Checkout components with dependencies (incl. express-payments lazy chunk). Lazy on /checkout. @see W-21553426

client.name: assets/\(package\)-\(fast-deep-equal\)-*.js
client.comment: Route entry chunk that includes fast-deep-equal and route deps (e.g. react-hook-form). @see W-21553426

client.name: assets/\(package\)-\(i18next-browser-languagedetector\)-*.js
client.comment: i18next language detector used by i18n. Slightly over 50 kB baseline.
For every built JS chunk that exceeds the baseline limit, you must explicitly approve it above. We must try our best to minimize the bundle size. These are uncompressed numbers (before gzip/brotli).
